## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request is focused on one feature or problem.
- [ ] I searched existing issues, discussions, and pull requests before submitting.
- [ ] The project builds successfully.
- [ ] I tested the affected functionality.
- [ ] I performed relevant regression testing.
- [ ] I reviewed and understand all submitted code.
- [ ] I take responsibility for all submitted code, including AI-assisted portions.
- [ ] I documented hardware-specific behavior and firmware dependencies.
- [ ] I documented known risks and limitations.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical.
- [ ] I updated documentation where necessary.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, tokens, personal data, installers, compiled binaries, or build output.
- [ ] I did not introduce unrelated formatting or refactoring changes.
- [ ] Reused code and assets are properly attributed and license-compatible.
